title: J-mod
description:
本模组仅支持中文！！！包含全新方块、武器、怪物、指令、装备、生物群系、维度和附魔！
This mod supports only Chinese!!! It includes brand-newblocks,weapons,monsters,commands, equipment, biomes, dimensions, and enchantments!
body:
## ☺作者附言   Author's Note
本模组由Mccreator2025.3创作。虽然内容尚不丰富，但我会逐步完善它。祝您玩得愉快！
This mod was created by Mccreator2025.3. While the content isn't extensive yet, I'll gradually polish it over time. Have fun playing!
做模组也是很累的，如果您喜欢玩本模组，那么不妨给我一个[订阅](https://space.bilibili.com/3632319241914623)吧！
Creating mods is quite exhausting. If you enjoy playing this mod, why not give me a [subscription](https://space.bilibili.com/3632319241914623)?
# ↓安装指南   Installation Guide
J-mod 支持多种模组加载器，但我推荐使用NeoForge Loader，以获得最简单轻便的使用体验。如果您使用的是第三方启动器，它可能内置了自动安装模组加载器的功能。安装好模组加载器后，您可以像其他文件一样，将 J-mod 放入您的mods文件夹中。J-mod supports multiple mod loaders, but I recommend using NeoForge Loader for the cleanest and most lightweight experience. If you use a third-party launcher, it may include built-in functionality to automatically install a mod loader. After installing the mod loader, you can simply place J-mod files into the mods folder like any other files.
# !!!警告 Warning
由于该模组内的模型仅支持1.9至1.21.5版本，模组中的物品可能出现轻微异常。但只要避免在1.21.8版本游玩，即可规避此问题。
Since the models within the mod only support versions 1.9 to 1.21.5, the items in the mod may appear slightly odd. However, this issue can be avoided by not playing on version 1.21.8.
# ✈内容指南   Content Guide
### 版本格式：X.X（重大更新）.X（次要更新）.X（次要调整）
### Version Format: X.X (Major Update).X (Minor Update).X (Minor Adjustment)
一个叫作者之神的怪物是无法击败的，他会破坏您的存档，请不要将其放出来!
A monster called the Author God cannot be defeated. It will corrupt your save file. Do not release it!
如何进入我添加的维度：首先得有这个How to access the dimension I added: First, you need to have this:![激活器Activator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/abc7131373566c0ff8b4ce6cd61de0b395c05e33.png)
接下来用我模组内的方块摆成这样Next, arrange the blocks from my mod like this：![传送门Portal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/526daa861bcbbd4f75cbe12d6a22cd55ec19199c.jpeg)
激活它Activate it：![传送门Portal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/806896ce59902a415f706e1a248b08f70a04fd09.jpeg)
进入Enter：![进入传送门Enter Portal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/912caf221c298ec65eaa1bebcb6b660d989a85a9.jpeg)
# ☠如何报告问题    How to Report Issues
非常抱歉，目前我尚未设立专门的故障报告渠道。不过，若您已在中国哔哩哔哩平台[订阅](https://space.bilibili.com/3632319241914623)了我的频道，可通过私信功能向我反馈问题、报告故障、崩溃或其他异常情况。请务必注明您使用的模组信息，并附上崩溃时的日志文件。I apologize, but I currently don't have a dedicated place for you to report bugs. However, if you've already [subscribed](https://space.bilibili.com/3632319241914623) to me on China's Bilibili, you can send me a private message to track issues, report bugs, crashes, and other problems. Please be sure to include information about the mods you're using and attach any crash logs.
